title: Multiple Recurring Tasks on a board with different due date needs
excerpt: I’d like to be able to set due dates for recurring tasks.  I realize that I can create a recipe to create a task with its own due date.  But I need to create multiple recurring tasks on the board with various due dates. …

posts.author: weblifestores (Fred B)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to be able to set due dates for recurring tasks. I realize that I can create a recipe to create a task with its own due date. But I need to create multiple recurring tasks on the board with various due dates. Some that need 3 days, while others 5 days. How can I do this?

posts.author: boyan.tzvetkov (Boyan Tzvetkov)
posts.cookedHtml: I am seeing a lot of posts, where users ask questions, but not much feedback from Monday.com

posts.author: TraceJackson (Trace Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: I could really use a native way to deal with recurring tasks, of all sorts, of all date and recurrence requirements. The fact that Monday doesn’t have this built in natively is a huge downside to those of us who lean HEAVILY on task usage.

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

We’ve been inspired by all these comments about creating this feature and good news, we went and created the app! We’ve just launched Recurring Tasks, which now allows you to create recurring/repeating tasks in your monday.com boards. It is currently in Beta so please download it, give it a try and we would love to know what you think. I’ll also be more than happy to directly feed it back to our team!

Thanks,
Amalia

posts.author: TraceJackson (Trace Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: Disappointing that the ‘solution’ is a premium app, rather than natively built in or a free option.

posts.author: Henrivdm (Henri)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes my evaluation of Monday_com as a solution for our company has suddenly got a big red mark against it…basic task recurrence should be a native feature for a premium platform like this!

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @weblifestores , @boyan.tzvetkov , @TraceJackson , @Henrivdm

We have created the app Recurring Tasks Schedule Pro - monday.com App Marketplace, which allows you to setup recurring tasks on item and subitem level in few simple clicks. It has various advanced features like

  1. Highly customizable recurrence
  2. Ability to set status, due date, target group on schedule run
  3. Calendar view (to visualize your upcoming tasks on calendar)
  4. Weekday based schedules (2nd Thursday of month, etc)
  5. Custom date based name
  6. Notifications to task assignee

Screenshot 2024-08-12 at 3.16.42 PM1448×1686 252 KB

posts.author: Henrivdm (Henri)
posts.cookedHtml:
I appreciate your suggestion of a paid for 3d party app, but my point is that basic recurrence should be native functionality.
For good sake I use a wonderful and simple personal organisation app called Remember the Milk that has recurrence of all types built in.
It should not be a special thing for a platform like Monday_com!
